name: super-init
description: One-command project initialization: code graph, caveman mode, and auto-generated agents tailored to your stack.

interface.shortDescription: Project initialization with code graph, caveman, and auto-generated agents.
interface.longDescription: Analyzes your project structure, installs code-review-graph for smart context, enables caveman mode for token efficiency, and generates .claude/agents/ with team lead + role-specific agents based on detected tech stack.
